# PERF-242 negative: one scratch reused across iterations (no per-iter make)
lang: go
file: PERF-242-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

func EncodeAll(items [][]byte) int {
	scratch := make([]byte, 0, 256)
	total := 0
	for _, raw := range items {
		scratch = scratch[:0]
		scratch = append(scratch, raw...)
		total += len(scratch)
	}
	return total
}
